title: Glass Mugs
description: Turns glass bottles to glass mugs while keeping the vanilla style.
body:
## Overview

Glass Mugs is a simple resource pack that changes the look of glass bottles to nice mugs while keeping their vanilla look. This includes:
- Glass Bottles
- Water Bottles
- Honey Bottles
- Potions
- Splash Potions
- Lingering Potions
- Dragon's Breath

![All of the different glass mugs, represented on a table.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/853ef1760cd562a1b1a1dd0c67d0f99328f21df9.png)

## Features

- Easier to differentiate potions by colour
- Built-in drinking animations
- Items renamed to mugs in multiple languages
- they look cute :3

Credits to [ThatCuteOne](https://modrinth.com/user/ThatCuteOne) for the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepacks?q=eating%20animation) resource pack, for reused parts of animation code.

If you catch any bugs and possibly know how to fix them, please send me descriptions or fixed versions on Matrix (@twilit.jack:matrix.org).
